title: santolina pectinata subsp. pectinata
intro: Santolina pectinata subsp. pectinata, also known as the yellow-gray cotton lavender, is a perennial shrubby plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, antiviral, and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Santolina pectinata subsp. pectinata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
